description: Phase 9 #51 UI wire-in — browser login → projects → editor → Preview-on-Device QR → iPhone 16 Pro simulator deep-link.

environment.os: macOS Darwin 23.3.0 (dev host) + Darwin 24.5.0 (Mac mini farm)

assertions: login page renders with 'DEV MODE: Sign in as demo user' button visible
no application error / runtime error surface present
01-login.proof: snapshot text contained 'DEV MODE: Sign in as demo user', screenshot matches reference

assertions: JD avatar visible (post-login state)
'Recent projects' heading + 'Preload Script Test' card rendered
'Edit App' button clickable
02-projects-list.proof: snapshot uids 3_4 (Recent projects heading), 3_3 (JD avatar), 3_7 (Edit App button)

assertions: editor shell fully rendered — NO 'Application error' / 'File system not initialized' crash
'Preview on device' button visible (uid=4_22) — Phase 9 #51 wire-in confirmed
'Starting up your project...' loading state present (sandbox session booting)
canvas iframe / preview iframe mounted (uid=4_6)
03-editor-loaded.proof: defensive watchDirectory guards (commits d92232fa + 5000a2fb) hold — the same seed project that crashed the editor before my fixes now renders cleanly.

assertions: QR dialog opens with title 'Preview on device'
manifest URL shown: exp://192.168.0.14:8787/manifest/25a3e2e846d090d9b13a4c372669c2558533f25b3740fbfa0104255ae7b686a1
'Copy Onlook URL' button present
'Expo Go fallback URL' disclosure present
04-qr-modal.proof: hook chain useMobilePreviewStatus → /status → renderQrSvg → QrModal all fire correctly; parseManifestUrl-derived sessionId (new field from commit 0e6fcf15) available on the result

assertions: OnlookMobileClient app active on iPhone 16 Pro sim ('Onlook Mobile Cli...' app-switcher tag top-left)
deep-link accepted — no red-box / error-screen
OverlayHost renders empty (correct idle state awaiting overlay push from editor)
05-sim-deep-link.proof: xcrun simctl openurl 899AA6D2-7A61-4209-98C3-671A6EAE2379 exp://... ran clean; subsequent screenshot shows the empty-mount state identical to Phase G's v2r-hello-pre-push.png baseline

assertions: full-page capture confirms no hidden errors below the fold
06-qr-modal-fullpage.proof: fullPage screenshot shows the editor shell + QR modal overlay with no off-screen error states

assertions: OnlookMobileClient still renders cleanly on iPhone 16 Pro sim after commit efb9286c + 1c55af93
Empty OverlayHost = correct idle state (bridgeless WebSocket.onmessage doesn't dispatch; cf-expo-relay events channel is the live path, covered by smoke-e2e.sh)
07-sim-post-rls-fix.proof: xcrun simctl io screenshot captured via SSH to scry-farmer@192.168.0.17 post-RLS fix

assertions: QR modal still works after commit efb9286c (RLS fix)
manifest URL unchanged from baseline
08-post-rls-fix-qr-modal.proof: snapshot confirms QR dialog + copy button + fallback URL all render

assertions: [browser-metro] bundled 3 modules in 689ms (entry: index.tsx) — console log confirms the browser-metro iframe-preview bundler successfully compiled seeded source files after the RLS fix let the sync engine pull them
Empty-branch (branch1) logs info 'Initial bundle skipped — branch has no source files yet' instead of error (commit 1c55af93)
Editor UI renders cleanly — canvas iframe in place, top-bar buttons intact, chat panel populated
09-editor-post-bundle-success.proof: console.info log chain: attachBrowserMetro → Running initial bundle → bundled 3 modules in 689ms

not_yet_verified_in_this_run.scenario: real overlay render on the sim (Hello-world via cf-expo-relay)
not_yet_verified_in_this_run.reason: Requires spinning up cf-expo-relay + cache wranglers (already tested separately via bash apps/cf-expo-relay/scripts/smoke-e2e.sh — 11/11 green this session). To get a mounted visual on the sim via the cf-expo-relay path, the cache would also need a real overlay bundle in place of the synthetic placeholder.
not_yet_verified_in_this_run.alternative_evidence: Phase G's plans/adr/assets/v2-pipeline/v2r-{hello,updated}.png screenshots captured on the same Xcode 16.4 + iOS 18.6 sim setup prove the render pipeline works end-to-end.

not_yet_verified_in_this_run.scenario: live-edit round-trip (editor code change → WS push → sim re-render)
not_yet_verified_in_this_run.reason: Seed project has no source files, so buildMobilePreviewBundle fails with 'No entry file found'. A real code edit can't be exercised without seeding a working Expo project.
not_yet_verified_in_this_run.alternative_evidence: two-tier-e2e.spec.ts (task #96 in v2 queue) exercises the browser-bundler → wrap → push → relay → mountOverlay chain in Node mocks — 3 tests pass in 132ms.

issues_found_during_verification.description: RLS policy on storage.objects 'new row violates row-level security policy' when copyPreloadScriptToPublic uploads to expo-projects — cross-origin auth cookie not reaching the Supabase storage endpoint from the Next.js dev server.
issues_found_during_verification.status: known local-dev limitation, not a production bug; in production the sandbox runs on the same origin chain as the editor and the cookie propagates normally

issues_found_during_verification.description: 'No entry file found' BundleError — the seed 'Preload Script Test' project is empty (no index.tsx, src/App.tsx, etc.). Expected behavior; the SandboxManager logs the error and retries.
issues_found_during_verification.status: not a code bug; seed-data gap

issues_found_during_verification.description: Penpal connection timeouts fire during the 'starting up project' window because there's no working preview (LOCAL-ENV-02 cascade). Commit a33e0405 now caps these at 10 attempts (previously infinite retry).

bugs_fixed_during_verification: LOCAL-ENV-01 (RLS upload rejection) → fixed by efb9286c + 6f905539 (auto-reapply RLS after drizzle push, CI-safe)
LOCAL-ENV-03 (penpal infinite retry) → fixed by a33e0405 (cap at 10 attempts)
cosmetic: 'Initial bundle failed' red-error on empty branches → fixed by 1c55af93 (downgrade to info log)
architectural: mobile-preview runtime stale after tmpwatch wipe → fixed by 9339ac60 + f09e5abd + adc61266 (self-heal /status + /manifest + /:hash.bundle)
architectural: watchDirectory throws on uninitialized fs → fixed by d92232fa + 5000a2fb (defensive guards + initial-push skip)
